document:
Summit Grid Support Handbook

Support hours: Monday-Friday, 09:00-17:00 UTC.
Refund policy: Customers may request a refund within 28 days of purchase.
Invoice questions should go to billing@summitgrid.example.
Security incidents must be acknowledged within 24 hours.
Escalation changes must be documented in the operations runbook.
question: How many days does the refund policy allow?
